summary: Match score 21.4% — poor match. The role requires a strategy consultant or corporate development professional with M&A experience, insurance/financial services domain expertise, and C1 German. The candidate's PMO coordination background at HSBC provides partial financial services exposure, but the core requirements (corporate strategy, M&A, C1 German) represent fundamental gaps that cannot be reframed. Application is not recommended.
